title: croixia decurrens
intro: Croixia decurrens, also known as the Australian saltbush, is a shrub native to the Australian outback, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and oval-shaped leaves. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Croixia decurrens include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems.
